_note: All programs pay via NEFT/IMPS to Indian bank. UPI/GPay works from same account. No PayPal/Payoneer. Minor accounts accepted.
payment_flow: Program → NEFT to Indian bank account → spend via GPay/UPI

programs.name: Flipkart Affiliate
programs.commission: 6-12% on most categories, up to 15% fashion
programs.notes: Instant approval. Lowest payout threshold (Rs 250). Best to start with.

programs.name: EarnKaro
programs.commission: Aggregates 150+ brands — Meesho, Myntra, Amazon, Flipkart etc.
programs.notes: PAYS DIRECTLY TO UPI/GPAY. Min Rs 10. You already know this from Meesho. Best for Telegram product posts.

programs.name: Amazon India Associates
programs.notes: amazon.in — NOT amazon.com. Works fine. Best volume. Need a live website for approval.

programs.name: Cuelinks
programs.notes: One JS snippet in site = auto-converts all product mentions to affiliate links. Very powerful. Nykaa, Udemy, BookMyShow, HostGator.

programs.name: BigRock India
programs.commission: Up to Rs 2000 per hosting sale
programs.notes: India biggest domain registrar. Target 'cheap domain india' keywords. High value per sale.

programs.name: Admitad India (Coursera, Udemy, 1500+ brands)
programs.notes: Access to Coursera, Udemy, and 1500 other brands via one network. Education content = halal.
